title: Single Block Feature
description:
Properties:
• description ({ identifier })
• places_block
• enforce_placement_rules (boolean)
• enforce_survivability_rules (boolean)
• randomize_rotation (boolean)
• may_attach_to ({ min_sides_must_attach, auto_rotate, top, ... })
• may_not_attach_to ({ top, bottom, north, ... })
• may_replace (string[])

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: The name of this feature in the form 'namespace_name:feature_name'. 'feature_name' must match the filename.

block.title: Block
block.description: Reference to the block to be placed.

anyOf.title: Places Block
anyOf.description: Reference to the block to be placed.

enforce_placement_rules.title: Enforce Placement Rules
enforce_placement_rules.description: If true, enforce the block's canPlace check.

enforce_survivability_rules.title: Enforce Survivability Rules
enforce_survivability_rules.description: If true, enforce the block's canSurvive check.

randomize_rotation.title: Randomize Rotation
randomize_rotation.description: If true, randomizes the block's cardinal orientation.

may_attach_to.title: May Attach To
may_attach_to.description:
Allowlist which specifies where the block can be placed.

Properties:
• min_sides_must_attach (int)
• auto_rotate (boolean)
• top (string[])
• bottom (string[])
• north (string[])
• east (string[])
• south (string[])
• west (string[])
• ... and 3 more properties

defaultSnippets.label: May Attach To
defaultSnippets.description: Allowlist which specifies where the block can be placed.

may_not_attach_to.title: May Not Attach To
may_not_attach_to.description:
Denylist which specifies where the block can't be placed.

Properties:
• top (string[])
• bottom (string[])
• north (string[])
• east (string[])
• south (string[])
• west (string[])
• all (string[])
• sides (string[])
• ... and 1 more properties
